strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js experience across diverse domains including CRM integrations, automation platforms, and GIS systems, directly aligning with the role’s stack needs.

Proven ability to own end-to-end systems — from backend APIs to frontend UIs and DevOps tooling — demonstrated through leadership in open-source GISCollective and commercial platforms at Optilyz and re:cinq.

Strong architectural mindset evidenced by contributions to agentic AI infrastructure, test-driven development practices, and performance-optimized systems, matching the emphasis on clean software design.
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 raises questions about recent active development momentum and on-site readiness.
Limited explicit mention of React or Nest.js in recent roles, despite their inclusion in required skills — though Ember.js and Node.js experience suggest transferable knowledge.
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may hinder full integration in a high on-site presence environment in Berlin.
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, hands-on fullstack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and scalable system design across energy-adjacent domains like automation and GIS, directly mirroring the platform’s needs; his leadership in building production-grade open-source tools and integrating complex data workflows demonstrates the ownership and architectural maturity the role seeks, and while his German proficiency and recent gap are notable, his proven adaptability, technical depth, and passion for clean systems make him a compelling candidate with high upside if on-site integration is supported.
